changelog: v3.3.4: Installer aggiunge automaticamente esclusioni Windows Defender per InstallDir (C:\Program Files\86NocConnector) + ConfigDir + nssm.exe + connector.ps1. Previene definitivamente kill silenzioso di updater e connector da ASR rules (Attack Surface Reduction) e real-time scanning. Richiede admin durante install (gia' lo e' via wizard). Include tutti i fix v3.3.3 (updater staged in InstallDir Defender-safe + breadcrumb + dual-log), v3.3.2 (ENTERPRISE dual-path iLO), v3.3.1 (WMI updater), v3.3.0 (Remediation executor).
